message:
feat(diary): Add raw session formatting, toxicity check, type consolidation

RAW SESSION FORMATTING (src/diary.ts):
Add formatRawSession(content, ext) for when cass export is unavailable:
- .md/.markdown: Return as-is (already human-readable)
- .jsonl: Parse each line, format as "**role**: content"
- .json: Handle multiple structures (messages, conversation, turns, array)
- Unknown formats: Return with warning header

Helper functions:
- formatJsonlSession: JSONL line-by-line parsing with error markers
- formatJsonSession: JSON with flexible schema detection

TOXICITY CHECK (src/commands/playbook.ts):
- Add checkToxicity(content) before adding bullets
- Loads toxic patterns from global and repo logs
- Blocks content that matches semantic toxicity patterns
- Prevents re-introduction of previously deprecated harmful rules

TYPE CONSOLIDATION (src/cass.ts):
- Remove local CassTimeline interfaces
- Import from types.ts (CassTimelineGroup, CassTimelineResult)
- Single source of truth for type definitions

FIXES:
- src/llm.ts: Fix generateContext to use object.briefing (generateObject returns {object})
- src/reflect.ts: Remove unused ReflectorOutput type alias
- test/extract-diary-safe.test.ts: Remove unused mock

WHY:
formatRawSession enables diary extraction from any session format without
depending on cass export. The toxicity check prevents the playbook from
accumulating harmful patterns that were previously deprecated.
